setup.title: X-Dispatch
setup.subtitle: Select your X-Plane installation to get started

hints.permissionMac: macOS is blocking file access. Go to System Settings > Privacy & Security > Files and Folders and allow X-Dispatch, then restart the app.
hints.permissionWindows: Windows is blocking file access. Right-click X-Dispatch and select "Run as administrator", or check the folder permissions in Properties > Security.
hints.permissionLinux: Permission denied. Check that your user has read access to the X-Plane folder, or run chmod +r on the file.
hints.fileBusy: The file is locked by another program. Close X-Plane and any scenery or addon tools, then retry.

tooltips.flightPlan: Load or import a flight plan
tooltips.loadPlan: Load an X-Plane .fms flight plan file
tooltips.pin: Place aircraft anywhere on the map
tooltips.launchSelectPosition: Choose a gate, runway, or drop a pin on the map

airports.title: Airports
airports.description: Manage your favorite airports and home base.

autoNav.label: Open home airport on startup
autoNav.description: Frame the camera on your home airport and open its info panel when X-Dispatch launches.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.description: Tap the star in any airport panel to add it here. Your home airport is shown first.
favorites.empty: No favorite airports yet — tap the star in any airport panel to add one.

support.reportDescription: Describe what went wrong. Your app state and recent actions are automatically included to help diagnose the issue.
support.sendSuccess: Thanks! Your report has been sent.
support.sendError: Failed to send report. Please try again.

simbrief.pilotIdHelp: Your SimBrief Pilot ID (found in your SimBrief account settings)
simbrief.pilotIdNote: Your Pilot ID is a numeric identifier. Find it at simbrief.com → Account Settings → Pilot ID.
simbrief.freeService: SimBrief is a free flight planning service

fmsExportTargets.heading: FMS export targets
fmsExportTargets.description: Drop the SimBrief flight plan into your aircraft's flight-plan folder.
fmsExportTargets.dialogDescription: Pick the SimBrief format your aircraft addon expects, and the folder it reads from.
fmsExportTargets.label: Label
fmsExportTargets.empty: No targets yet. Add one to send SimBrief plans straight into an addon folder.

about.title: About
about.description: Flight dispatch and airport visualization for X-Plane
about.projectNotice: A passion project built for the X-Plane community, shared free of charge and developed in the open.
about.dataStorageDescription: App preferences, cache, and database are stored here.
about.crashReportsDescription: Help improve X-Dispatch by automatically sending crash reports
about.crashReportsNote: Restart required for changes to take effect. No personal data is collected.
about.independenceNotice: X-Dispatch is an independent community project and is not affiliated with or endorsed by X-Plane, SimBrief, Navigraph, VATSIM, or IVAO.
about.debugShortcut: You can also use Ctrl+Shift+D (Cmd+Shift+D on Mac)

xplane.title: X-Plane Installation
xplane.closeOnLaunchDescription: Automatically close X-Dispatch when X-Plane starts
xplane.name: Name
xplane.launchArgsDescription: Extra command line arguments passed to X-Plane on every cold start
xplane.launchArgsSessionSubtext: Set via --xp-arg, applied this session only

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.mapStyleDescription: Select a map style for the background
appearance.customStyleHint: Paste a MapLibre style URL (e.g. https://tiles.openfreemap.org/styles/liberty) or a raster tile URL pattern (e.g. https://tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png).
appearance.idleOrbitDescription: Slowly rotate around selected airport after inactivity
appearance.zoomLevelDescription: Scale the entire interface up or down

graphics.title: Graphics
graphics.mapStyleDescription: Select a map style for the background
graphics.customStyleHint: Paste a MapLibre style.json URL, or a raster tile pattern with {{placeholder}}.

mapStyleError.insecure-protocol: URL must use https:// (or http://localhost for dev)
mapStyleError.unsupported-format: URL must be a MapLibre style.json or a raster tile pattern with {{placeholder}}

graphics.terrain3dDesc: Mountains rise off the map when zoomed in.
graphics.terrainShadingDesc: Shading and contour lines so mountains look better.
graphics.surfaceDetailDesc: Curve smoothness for taxiway and pavement edges
graphics.lightsPerfHint: Turn these off to improve performance.
graphics.taxiwayGlowDesc: Multi-layer glow effect on taxiway lights
graphics.dayNightDesc: Real-time day/night shadow on the globe

navigation.title: Navigation
navigation.navigraphInfo: Navigraph data provides enhanced navigation data including updated airways, procedures, and frequencies.
navigation.airportLayoutDescription: Airport geometry from apt.dat files (runways, taxiways, gates, etc.)
navigation.navDataSourceDescription: Navaids, waypoints, airways, procedures, and frequencies
navigation.cacheDescription: Clear cached data to force a full reload from X-Plane files

vatsim.title: VATSIM
vatsim.sectionDescription: Live air traffic from the VATSIM network
vatsim.description: Show live pilot positions on the map
vatsim.refreshNote: VATSIM data is refreshed every 15 seconds to comply with API guidelines.
vatsim.aboutDescription: Pilots are displayed as icons on the map. Click on a pilot to see their flight details including callsign, aircraft, departure, and destination.
vatsim.refreshHelp: How often to refresh VATSIM data (recommended: 15s)

companionApps.title: Companion Apps
companionApps.description: Programs to launch alongside X-Plane (XPME, ATC clients, hardware drivers).
companionApps.notElevatedHint: Companion apps will fail to launch. Right-click X-Dispatch and choose Run as administrator (Windows), or relaunch from a terminal with sudo (macOS/Linux).

error.needsAdmin: X-Dispatch needs administrator privileges to launch this app
error.fileMissing: Executable not found at the configured path

logs.title: X-Plane logs
logs.description: Read X-Plane's Log.txt to see what the simulator reported during your last session.
logs.truncatedNotice: Showing the last {{shownMb}} MB of a {{totalMb}} MB log.

empty.noLog: No log yet — has X-Plane been launched at least once on this install?
empty.allClear: Nothing X-Dispatch flags in this log.
empty.noMatches: No entries match the current filter.

vatsim.notEnabled: Enable VATSIM in settings to see live data

airportInfo.noGatewayData: NO GATEWAY DATA FOR THIS AIRPORT
airportInfo.gatewayDescription: This data shows submissions for this airport.

debug.title: Debug Mode Active
debug.instruction: Click on any feature on the map to inspect its properties.

launcher.title: Flight Setup
launcher.xplaneRunning: X-Plane is running - flight will be changed via API
launcher.selectDeparture: Select a departure on the map
launcher.spawnErrorAccess: Windows blocked the launch. Right-click X-Dispatch and choose "Run as administrator", then try again.
launcher.spawnErrorMissing: X-Plane executable not found at the configured path. Check the X-Plane install path in Settings.
launcher.spawnErrorGeneric: Failed to launch X-Plane. See the log for details (Settings → Logs).

weatherDialog.title: Weather Settings
weatherDialog.emptyHint: Click a cloud or wind layer in the diagram to edit

logbook.title: Flight Logbook
logbook.emptyHint: Your last 10 flights will appear here after launching

dropZone.title: Drop files to install
dropZone.subtitle: ZIP, 7z, or RAR archives
dropZone.ariaLabel: Drop or click to select addon archive files

installer.successHint: Your addons are ready to use
installer.supportedTypes: Aircraft, plugins, scenery, liveries, and more

scenery.loadingHint: This may take a moment for large installations
scenery.deleteDescription: Permanently delete "{{name}}" from disk? This cannot be undone.
scenery.safeModeOn: Drag restricted to same category. Turn off to freely reorder (advanced).
scenery.safeModeOff: Free reorder enabled. Items can be dragged across categories - use with caution!
scenery.priorityHint: Entries at the top override those below. Drag to reorder or use Auto Sort.
scenery.dragHintSafe: Drag to reorder within the same category. Changes are saved when you click Save Order.
scenery.dragHintUnsafe: Safe mode OFF - You can drag items across categories. This may cause scenery issues if done incorrectly.
scenery.backupsDescription: Restore a previous version of scenery_packs.ini
scenery.noBackups: No backups available yet. Backups are created automatically when you save changes.

liveryDialog.title: Liveries
liveryDialog.confirmDelete: Delete livery "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

scriptsDialog.title: Lua Scripts
scriptsDialog.subtitle: FlyWithLua Scripts folder
scriptsDialog.confirmDelete: Delete script "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

export.heading: Send to FMS
export.emptyHint: No export targets configured. Add one in Settings → SimBrief.
export.noMatches: None of your configured formats are present in this SimBrief plan.

simbrief.title: Import from SimBrief
simbrief.description: Fetch your latest flight plan from SimBrief
simbrief.configurePilotId: Please configure your Pilot ID in Settings → SimBrief
simbrief.clickToFetch: Click the button below to fetch your latest flight plan

briefing.sigmetsDesc: Significant weather warnings along your route — turbulence, icing, thunderstorms, etc.
briefing.noSigmets: No significant weather warnings along route
briefing.firDesc: Air traffic control regions your flight passes through
briefing.notamsDesc: Notices to airmen — airport closures, runway changes, and other operational alerts
briefing.transAltDesc: Altitude where you switch between local altimeter (QNH) and standard pressure (STD) — set your altimeter accordingly

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.description: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again or reload the application.
